title: Form50BisInput
description: Input data submitted to fill a Thai Withholding Tax Certificate (Form 50 Bis). Every leaf path here is the exact form input name, e.g. payer.name, income.0.amountPaid, issueDate.yearBE. Bindings that don't map 1:1 to a single input: payer.taxId / payee.taxId are split across 5 digit boxes (name + .1..5); withholdingReturn.formType and taxPaymentCondition.condition are enums whose chosen value ticks a one-hot checkbox (name.<value>). Derived values (total amount, total tax, amount-in-words) are computed by the form from income[] and are NOT part of this input.

bookNumber.description: certificate.bookNumber — book number (เล่มที่).

number.description: certificate.number — running number within the book (เลขที่).

payer.description: Party that withholds and remits the tax.

taxId.description: payer.taxId — 13-digit Taxpayer ID (rendered into boxes payer.taxId.1..5).

payee.description: Party from whom tax is withheld (income recipient).

taxId.description: payee.taxId — 13-digit Taxpayer ID / Thai citizen ID (boxes payee.taxId.1..5).

withholdingReturn.description: The withholding-tax return this certificate corresponds to.

sequenceNumber.description: withholdingReturn.sequenceNumber — line/sequence number of this payee in the return (ลำดับที่).

income.description: Fixed 14 rows matching the form's printed income lines, in order. Row index is the slot: income.<i>.amountPaid etc. Leave a row's fields empty/omit if that line has no payment.

prefixItems.title: Row 0 — Section 40(1): salary, wages, allowance, bonus
Row 4 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, tax-credit eligible, net profit taxed at 30%
Row 5 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, tax-credit eligible, net profit taxed at 25%
Row 6 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, tax-credit eligible, net profit taxed at 20%
Row 7 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, tax-credit eligible, other rate (specify)
Row 8 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, not credit-eligible, from CIT-exempt net profit (2.1)
Row 9 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, not credit-eligible, case (2.2) [best-effort label]
Row 10 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, not credit-eligible, case (2.3) [best-effort label]
Row 11 — Section 40(4)(b) dividend, not credit-eligible, case (2.4)/(2.5) others (specify) [best-effort]
Row 12 — Line 5: Section 3 Tredecim payments (prizes, promotions, rent, transport, services, etc.)

funds.description: Amounts deducted into welfare funds (Thai Baht, optional).

governmentPension.description: funds.governmentPension — Govt Pension / GPF / private-school teachers' welfare fund.

taxPaymentCondition.description: Who bears the withholding tax (ผู้จ่ายเงิน).

condition.description: taxPaymentCondition.condition — ticks one-hot checkbox taxPaymentCondition.<value>. withheldFromPayment = deducted from payee; paidByPayer* = payer absorbs the tax.

otherDetail.description: taxPaymentCondition.otherDetail — free text, required when condition is "other".

issueDate.description: Date the certificate is issued, as three boxes on the form.

month.description: issueDate.month — month name (Thai or English per form language).

yearBE.description: issueDate.yearBE — year in the Buddhist Era (e.g. 2569).

datePaid.description: Date the income was paid, as printed (e.g. "31 ธ.ค. 69").

amountPaid.description: Gross amount paid, in Thai Baht.

taxWithheld.description: Tax withheld and remitted, in Thai Baht.

datePaid.description: Date the income was paid, as printed.

amountPaid.description: Gross amount paid, in Thai Baht.

taxWithheld.description: Tax withheld and remitted, in Thai Baht.

payer.name: Lanna Tech Co., Ltd.
payer.address: 123 Sukhumvit Rd., Khlong Toei, Khlong Toei, Bangkok 10110
